name: Adam Geller
bio: Adam Geller was appointed Chief Product Officer on September 30, 2024 and named an executive officer in November 2024. His FY2025 disclosure is dominated by a December 5, 2024 equity grant tied to his promotion — a mix of time-based RSUs, performance-based PSUs, and stock options that together account for roughly $28 million of grant-date fair value.

footnotes: Stock Awards comprise time-based RSUs plus PSUs valued at the probable outcome of the FY2025 performance condition (grant-date fair value). Per the proxy, the maximum-performance value of his PSU portion would be $21,943,522.
Option Awards: a stock option granted on December 5, 2024 with one-fourth vesting on September 30, 2025 and the remainder monthly through September 30, 2028.
Non-Equity Incentive Plan Compensation reflects payout under Zscaler's Executive Incentive Compensation Plan, pro-rated for his partial-year service as an executive officer.
